When the Moon's northern horn be higher than (he other by
a half, then it is called Lahgala or Plough (in shape). The effect of
this would be trouble to farmers, but coxdiality among the rulers
of countries without any apparent reason, as well as good crops
and prosperity in the country.

The Moon*sTransit IV 35
[A question might be raised here : How could there be good
food crops and prosperity in the land when the husbandmen are
in trouble ? The answer would be that when food crops are avail-
able in plenty their prices fall down. So the agriculturists suffer
in consequence. It is also possible that there might be some epi-
demic breaking out among the farmers.
